  "questions": [
    {
      "question": "A bank manager has two employees, A and B, who need to access a shared resource. Employee A has higher priority and must access the resource for 5 minutes. Employee B has lower priority and must access the resource for 2 minutes. What is the minimum time required for both employees to access the shared resource?",
      "options": [
        "A) 5 minutes",
        "B) 7 minutes",
        "C) 8 minutes",
        "D) 10 minutes"
      ],
      "correct":
